title: Idhu Kadhala Mudhal Kadhala Lyrics Thulluvadho Ilamai
stanzas: <div>Idhu Kadhala Mudhal Kadhala Lyrics Thulluvadho Ilamai

Idhu kadhala
mudhal kadhalaa
oru pennidam uruvaanatha
idhu nilaikkumaa
needikkumaa nenje

un paarvaiyil
un sparisathil
un vaasathil
un kobathil
idhayathai thaan abagarathaai
kaaranam sol penne

Idhu kadhala
mudhal kadhalaa
oru pennidam uruvaanatha
idhu nilaikkumaa
needikkumaa nenje

iravu thookkatham tholainthathe
oru vitha yaekkam vanthathe
en vazhakai indruthaa
un kaiyyile

pudhithaai en nenjukkul
paayum raththam
urangum pothu yedhetho
ularal saththam

ada kanavukkule kannadi
kolaigal yutham
en kavithai kirukirkellaame
neethaan artham

Idhu kadhala
mudhal kadhalaa
indha vayathile
varum maatramaa
kuzhambugiren
pulambugiren unnaale
unnaale unnaale unnaale

enna pesinen
enna ninaikkiren
engu pogiren
edhu seigiren
puriyavillai theriyavillai
pudhai manalaai ponaaye

ini vasantham yaethadi
vazhve varutham thaanadi
kaatril alainthu naan thirigiren

pudhithaai en nenjukkul
paayum raththam
urangum pothu yedhetho
ularal saththam

ada kanavukkule kannadi
kolaigal yutham
en kavithai kirukirkellaame
neethaan artham

pudhithaai en nenjukkul
paayum raththam
urangum pothu yedhetho
ularal saththam

ada kanavukkule kannadi
kolaigal yutham
en kavithai kirukirkellaame
neethaan artham

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses the emotions and experiences of first love, highlighting the beauty and innocence of romantic feelings.

In which movie does this song appear?

Idhu Kadhala Mudhal Kadhala is featured in the movie Thulluvadho Ilamai, which revolves around youthful love and relationships.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung by Yuvan, who is also the music director, showcasing his unique style and creativity.

When was the song released?

The song was released in 2002, becoming an instant hit among fans of Tamil music.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Idhu Kadhala Mudhal Kadhala, the protagonist reflects on the feelings of first love, capturing the innocence and excitement that comes with it. The song's soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics evoke a sense of nostalgia, making it relatable to anyone who has experienced love. Set against the backdrop of Thulluvadho Ilamai, it beautifully conveys the emotions of longing and affection. This romantic track is perfect for special occasions like anniversaries and weddings, resonating with listeners' hearts.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Idhu Kadhala Mudhal Kadhala from Thulluvadho Ilamai is a mesmerizing melody that captures the essence of first love. With Yuvan's soulful voice and heartfelt lyrics by Pa Vijay, this song resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced the magic of romance. The enchanting composition makes it a timeless favorite for lovers and dreamers alike.
stanzaMeanings: Is this love, the first love, is it a creation of a girl, is it a moonlight, is it a dream, my heart?
In your gaze, in your touch, in your presence, in your anger, my heart is the reason for the trouble, tell me, girl.
Is this love, the first love, is it a creation of a girl, is it a moonlight, is it a dream, my heart?
The night has taken away my sleep, a kind of longing has come, is my life in your hands?
When the new blood flows in my heart, at that time, some sound arises from somewhere.
In dreams, battles of reflections, my poetry is always meaningful to you.
Oh, the life is like a fleeting moment.
Is this love, the first love, will it come at this age? I am crying, crying, because of you, because of you, because of you, because of you.
What have I said, what am I thinking, where am I going, what am I doing, I don't understand, I don't know, I have become a new bride.
Now, what kind of spring is this, it is only sorrow, in the wind, I am turning around.
When the new blood flows in my heart, at that time, some sound arises from somewhere.
In dreams, battles of reflections, my poetry is always meaningful to you.
Oh, the life is like a fleeting moment.
When the new blood flows in my heart, at that time, some sound arises from somewhere.
In dreams, battles of reflections, my poetry is always meaningful to you.
